name: Corn Salad with Radishes, Jalapeno, and Lime
text:
### Preparation
1. Chop radishes, jalapeno, and cilantro leaves to your preference.
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl (season with salt to taste)
3. Salad can be stored in fridge for 1 day
small_text: Recipe by Christopher Testani. Photo Credit: Mel’s Kitchen Cafe, “SWEET CORN SALAD WITH RADISHES, JALAPENO AND LIME,”  2014, via https://www.melskitchencafe.com/sweet-corn-salad-with-radishes-jalapeno-and-lime/
